introSection: Boomerang was a steel shuttle roller coaster located at Korakuen Yuenchi in Bunkyo, Tokyo, Japan. It was a Launched Loop installation from Arrow Development.

* 1979 reference list listing this roller coaster
 * Photos of Boomerang on X
 * Boomerang on a magazine cover in September 1978

fullText:
Boomerang was a steel shuttle roller coaster located at Korakuen Yuenchi in Bunkyo, Tokyo, Japan. It was a Launched Loop installation from Arrow Development.






 * 1979 reference list listing this roller coaster
 * Photos of Boomerang on X
 * Boomerang on a magazine cover in September 1978
